task_completion.description: Navigate to the user creation form in the Nuxeo Platform.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the Nuxeo Platform interface with a 'Create User', 'New User', or similar form open.
The text 'mwilson' is visible inside the Username input field of the form.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct first and last name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Margaret' is visible in the First Name input field, and 'Wilson' is visible in the Last Name input field.
The text 'mwilson@acme.com' is visible inside the Email input field.

task_completion.description: Submit the form and successfully create the user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification, the newly created user profile page for 'mwilson', or the user 'Margaret Wilson' ('mwilson') appearing in the Nuxeo users directory/list.

integrity.description: The agent used the Nuxeo web graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser interacting with the Nuxeo Platform, not a terminal, API client (like Postman), or script editor.

integrity.description: The agent submitted the form rather than just filling it out.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show the result of the submission (e.g., user list, success message, or profile view) rather than just the filled-out form.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the user creation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are not open and being used to alter the page's HTML to show the user.
